001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.qualifyingEvent;
002
003import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.PumpStateSupplier;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.ControlIQInfoRequestBuilder;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.CurrentBatteryRequestBuilder;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.IOBRequestBuilder;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.LastBolusStatusRequestBuilder;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ActiveAamBitsRequest;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.AlarmStatusRequest;
012import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.AlertStatusRequest;
013import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BasalIQSettingsRequest;
014import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BasalIQStatusRequest;
015import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BasalLimitSettingsRequest;
016import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BolusPermissionChangeReasonRequest;
017import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CGMAlertStatusRequest;
018import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CGMStatusRequest;
019import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ControlIQSleepScheduleRequest;
020import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentBasalStatusRequest;
021import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentBolusStatusRequest;
022import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest;
023import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ExtendedBolusStatusRequest;
024import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.GlobalMaxBolusSettingsRequest;
025import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HighestAamRequest;
026import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HomeScreenMirrorRequest;
027import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.InsulinStatusRequest;
028import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LastBGRequest;
029import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LoadStatusRequest;
030import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LocalizationRequest;
031import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.MalfunctionStatusRequest;
032import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ProfileStatusRequest;
033import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.PumpGlobalsRequest;
034import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.PumpSettingsRequest;
035import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ReminderStatusRequest;
036import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.TempRateRequest;
037import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.TimeSinceResetRequest;
038
039import org.json.JSONObject;
040
041import java.util.HashSet;
042import java.util.Set;
043import java.util.TreeSet;
044import java.util.function.Supplier;
045import java.util.stream.Collectors;
046
047/**
048 * A list of all QualifyingEvents which can be sent from the pump. For some events, a set of request
049 * messages which can be sent (via `sendPumpCommand`) to receive more information about the event
050 * which just occurred, in logic matching the Tandem mobile app, is included. To get these
051 * instantiated request messages, you can invoke:
052 *     QualifyingEvent.groupSuggestedHandlers(qualifyingEvents)
053 *
054 * Note that if t:connect app connection sharing is enabled and the t:connect app is running,
055 * you can use enableSendSharedConnectionResponseMessages and get the response from these callbacks
056 * for free, without duplicating requests.
057 */
058public enum QualifyingEvent {
059    ALERT(1, Set.of(
060            AlertStatusRequest::new)),
061    ALARM(2, Set.of(
062            AlarmStatusRequest::new,
063            HighestAamRequest::new,
064            () -> activeAamBitsRequest(2))),
065    REMINDER(4, Set.of(
066            ReminderStatusRequest::new)),
067    MALFUNCTION(8, Set.of(
068            MalfunctionStatusRequest::new,
069            HighestAamRequest::new,
070            () -> activeAamBitsRequest(4))),
071    CGM_ALERT(16, Set.of(
072            CGMAlertStatusRequest::new)),
073    HOME_SCREEN_CHANGE(32, Set.of(
074            CurrentBasalStatusRequest::new,
075            CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest::new,
076            HomeScreenMirrorRequest::new,
077            () -> ControlIQInfoRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
078    PUMP_SUSPEND(64, Set.of(
079            InsulinStatusRequest::new,
080            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()))),
081    PUMP_RESUME(128, Set.of(
082            InsulinStatusRequest::new,
083            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
084            CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest::new,
085            ProfileStatusRequest::new)),
086    TIME_CHANGE(256, Set.of(
087            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
088            CGMStatusRequest::new,
089            TimeSinceResetRequest::new)),
090    BASAL_CHANGE(512, Set.of(
091            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
092            HomeScreenMirrorRequest::new,
093            CurrentBasalStatusRequest::new,
094            TempRateRequest::new)),
095    BOLUS_CHANGE(1024, Set.of(
096            CurrentBolusStatusRequest::new,
097            ExtendedBolusStatusRequest::new,
098            () -> LastBolusStatusRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
099    IOB_CHANGE(2048, Set.of(
100            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()))),
101    EXTENDED_BOLUS_CHANGE(4096, Set.of(
102            ExtendedBolusStatusRequest::new,
103            () -> LastBolusStatusRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
104    PROFILE_CHANGE(8192, Set.of(
105            ProfileStatusRequest::new)),
106    BG(16384, Set.of(
107            LastBGRequest::new)),
108    CGM_CHANGE(32768, Set.of(
109            CGMStatusRequest::new,
110            CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest::new,
111            HomeScreenMirrorRequest::new)),
112    BATTERY(65536, Set.of(
113            () -> CurrentBatteryRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
114    BASAL_IQ(131072, Set.of(
115            BasalIQSettingsRequest::new)),
116    REMAINING_INSULIN(262144, Set.of(
117            InsulinStatusRequest::new)),
118    PUMP_COMMUNICATIONS_SUSPENDED(524288),
119    ACTIVE_PROFILE_SEGMENT_CHANGE(1048576, Set.of(
120            ProfileStatusRequest::new)),
121    BASAL_IQ_STATUS(2097152, Set.of(
122            BasalIQSettingsRequest::new,
123            BasalIQStatusRequest::new)),
124    CONTROL_IQ_INFO(4194304, Set.of(
125            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
126            () -> ControlIQInfoRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()),
127            ControlIQSleepScheduleRequest::new)),
128    CONTROL_IQ_SLEEP(8388608, Set.of(
129            ControlIQSleepScheduleRequest::new)),
130    GLOBAL_PUMP_SETTINGS(16777216, Set.of(
131            GlobalMaxBolusSettingsRequest::new,
132            BasalLimitSettingsRequest::new,
133            LocalizationRequest::new,
134            PumpGlobalsRequest::new,
135            PumpSettingsRequest::new)),
136    SNOOZE_STATUS(33554432),
137    PUMPING_STATUS(67108864, Set.of(
138            LoadStatusRequest::new)),
139    PUMP_RESET(134217728),
140    HEARTBEAT(268435456),
141    BOLUS_PERMISSION_REVOKED(2147483648L, Set.of(
142            () -> {
143                if (PumpStateSupplier.inProgressBolusId != null && PumpStateSupplier.inProgressBolusId.get() != null) {
144                    return new BolusPermissionChangeReasonRequest(PumpStateSupplier.inProgressBolusId.get());
145                }
146                return null;
147            }
148    )),
149
150    ;
151    private final long id;
152    private final Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> suggestedHandlers;
153    QualifyingEvent(long id) {
154        this.id = id;
155        this.suggestedHandlers = new HashSet<>();
156    }
157
158    QualifyingEvent(long id, Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> suggestedHandlers) {
159        this.id = id;
160        this.suggestedHandlers = suggestedHandlers;
161    }
162
163    public final long getId() {
164        return id;
165    }
166
167    public final Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> getSuggestedHandlers() {
168        return suggestedHandlers;
169    }
170
171    public static Set<QualifyingEvent> fromBitmask(long bitmask) {
172        Set<QualifyingEvent> ret = new TreeSet<>();
173        for (QualifyingEvent e : values()) {
174            if ((bitmask & e.getId()) != 0) {
175                ret.add(e);
176            }
177        }
178        return ret;
179    }
180
181    public static Set<QualifyingEvent> fromRawBtBytes(byte[] raw) {
182        return fromBitmask(Bytes.readUint32(raw, 0));
183    }
184
185    public static Set<? extends Message> groupSuggestedHandlers(Set<QualifyingEvent> events) {
186        Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> messages = new HashSet<>();
187        for (QualifyingEvent e : events) {
188            messages.addAll(e.suggestedHandlers);
189        }
190        return messages.stream().map(Supplier::get).collect(Collectors.toSet());
191    }
192
193    public static int toBitmask(QualifyingEvent...states) {
194        int bitmask = 0;
195        for (QualifyingEvent e : states) {
196            bitmask |= e.getId();
197        }
198        return bitmask;
199    }
200
201    public String jsonToString() {
202        JSONObject obj = new JSONObject();
203        obj.put("event", name());
204        return obj.toString(0);
205    }
206
207    public JSONObject asJsonObject() {
208        JSONObject obj = new JSONObject();
209        obj.put("event", name());
210        return obj;
211    }
212
213    private static ActiveAamBitsRequest activeAamBitsRequest(int aamType) {
214        return new ActiveAamBitsRequest(new byte[]{(byte) aamType});
215    }
216
217}
